characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has dark brown hair pulled back and wears wire-rimmed glasses. Her facial features are smooth and symmetrical.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a light pink button-down shirt and large black over-ear headphones throughout the video.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, informative, and expressive, using frequent hand gestures.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Confidently English बोलने का power अलग ही होता है। [The power of speaking English confidently is something else.]
Character A says: Supernova app एक कमाल का AI tool है। [Supernova app is an amazing AI tool.]
Character A says: इसमें AI tutor आपको बोलते वक़्त real-time feedback देता है। [In this, the AI tutor gives you real-time feedback while you speak.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by emphasizing the power of confident English.
- Introduces Supernova as an AI tool.
- Highlights the core feature of real-time feedback during speaking practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Confidently English बोलने का power अलग ही होता है। Supernova app एक कमाल का AI tool है। इसमें AI tutor आपको बोलते वक़्त real-time feedback देता है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Wery. [Wery.]
Character A says: ये मुझे बता रहा है कि मेरा "V" और "W" का sound mix हो रहा है। [It's telling me that my "V" and "W" sounds are getting mixed.]
Character A says: Very. [Very.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's feedback mechanism using a common Indian-English pronunciation challenge (V vs W).
- Shows the immediate correction and improvement.
- Keeps the relatable, practical tone of the brand.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Wery. ये मुझे बता रहा है कि मेरा "V" और "W" का sound mix हो रहा है। Very.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: ये आपकी हिंदी के हिसाब से daily lessons plan करता है, ताकि आप अपनी कमज़ोरियों पर काम कर सकें। [It plans daily lessons according to your Hindi, so you can work on your weaknesses.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the Hindi-medium learning approach.
- Mentions daily lessons, a key Supernova feature.
- Reassures the user that the app adapts to their specific needs.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: ये आपकी हिंदी के हिसाब से daily lessons plan करता है, ताकि आप अपनी कमज़ोरियों पर काम कर सकें।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आप real-life situations जैसे interview या office meeting के लिए practice कर सकते हैं, वो भी बिना डरे। [You can practice for real-life situations like an interview or office meeting, that too without fear.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shifts focus from 'Harvard-trained coaches' to practical, real-world applications (interviews, office).
- Addresses the emotional barrier of fear/hesitation.
- Reinforces the supportive, older-sibling brand voice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: आप real-life situations जैसे interview या office meeting के लिए practice कर सकते हैं, वो भी बिना डरे।

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear call to action.
- Reinforces the core brand promise of speaking confidently.
- Displays the Supernova branding.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova. Download the app. Speak English Confidently.

brand_swaps_detected.supernova_swap: [removed to avoid aggressive hype and align with practical real-world focus]
